responses: Hello!
Hi there!
Welcome! How can I help you?
Goodbye!
Take care!
Have a great day!
You're welcome!
Happy to help!
Anytime!
I am an AI Chatbot.
You can call me SmartBot.
Sure! Tell me how I can help you.
This is an AI Chatbot built using Natural Language Processing and Deep Learning.
The chatbot uses intent classification to understand user queries and provide responses.
This project uses Python, TensorFlow, Keras, NLTK, NumPy and Flask.
I can answer predefined questions, identify user intents and provide relevant responses.
NLP stands for Natural Language Processing, a field of AI that helps computers understand human language.
Machine Learning enables systems to learn patterns from data and make predictions.
Deep Learning is a subset of Machine Learning that uses neural networks with multiple layers.
TensorFlow is a popular deep learning framework used for training and deploying neural networks.
I was developed by Aarushi Jha as part of an AI internship project.
